privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new synthetic pharmacy address book entry from scratch in the NOSH ChartingSystem. All metadata claims (name, address, city, state, zip, phone, fax, and specialty) exactly match the explicit generative instructions provided in the task description and are explicitly checked in the verifier.py script.
